mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM medicine WHERE is_controlled = 1 AND status = 1 ), 0) AS medicine_count, IFNULL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN i.expiry_date >= CURDATE() THEN (i.current_quantity - i.locked_quantity) ELSE 0 END ) FROM inventory i INNER JOIN medicine m ON i.medicine_id = m.id WHERE m.is_controlled = 1 ), 0) AS available_stock_total, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM warning_record wr INNER JOIN medicine m ON wr.medicine_id = m.id WHERE m.is_controlled = 1 AND wr.status = 'OPEN' ), 0) AS open_warning_count, IFNULL(( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM inventory i INNER JOIN medicine m ON i.medicine_id = m.id WHERE m.is_controlled = 1 AND i.current_quantity > 0 AND i.expiry_date >= CURDATE() AND DATEDIFF(i.expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= m.expiry_warning_days ), 0) AS expiring_batch_count

SELECT m.id, m.medicine_code, m.medicine_name, m.category_id, c.category_name, m.specification, m.unit, m.manufacturer, m.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, m.purchase_price, m.sale_price, m.safe_stock, m.expiry_warning_days, m.status, m.remark, IFNULL(stock.available_stock, 0) AS available_stock, IFNULL(stock.batch_count, 0) AS batch_count, IFNULL(warn.open_warning_count, 0) AS open_warning_count FROM medicine m INNER JOIN medicine_category c ON m.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON m.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT medicine_id, SUM( CASE WHEN expiry_date >= CURDATE() THEN (current_quantity - locked_quantity) ELSE 0 END ) AS available_stock, COUNT(1) AS batch_count FROM inventory GROUP BY medicine_id ) stock ON stock.medicine_id = m.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT medicine_id, COUNT(1) AS open_warning_count FROM warning_record WHERE status = 'OPEN' GROUP BY medicine_id ) warn ON warn.medicine_id = m.id
m.is_controlled = 1
AND ( m.medicine_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.medicine_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND m.status = #{status}
ORDER BY m.id DESC

SELECT m.id, m.medicine_code, m.medicine_name, m.category_id, c.category_name, m.specification, m.unit, m.manufacturer, m.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, m.purchase_price, m.sale_price, m.safe_stock, m.expiry_warning_days, m.status, m.remark, IFNULL(stock.available_stock, 0) AS available_stock, IFNULL(stock.batch_count, 0) AS batch_count, IFNULL(warn.open_warning_count, 0) AS open_warning_count FROM medicine m INNER JOIN medicine_category c ON m.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON m.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT medicine_id, SUM( CASE WHEN expiry_date >= CURDATE() THEN (current_quantity - locked_quantity) ELSE 0 END ) AS available_stock, COUNT(1) AS batch_count FROM inventory GROUP BY medicine_id ) stock ON stock.medicine_id = m.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT medicine_id, COUNT(1) AS open_warning_count FROM warning_record WHERE status = 'OPEN' GROUP BY medicine_id ) warn ON warn.medicine_id = m.id WHERE m.id = #{id} AND m.is_controlled = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT i.batch_no, i.current_quantity, i.locked_quantity, CASE WHEN i.expiry_date >= CURDATE() THEN (i.current_quantity - i.locked_quantity) ELSE 0 END AS available_quantity, i.production_date, i.expiry_date, i.last_inbound_time, i.last_outbound_time, CASE WHEN i.expiry_date < CURDATE() THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_expired, CASE WHEN i.expiry_date >= CURDATE() AND DATEDIFF(i.expiry_date, CURDATE()) <= m.expiry_warning_days THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_expiry_soon FROM inventory i INNER JOIN medicine m ON i.medicine_id = m.id WHERE i.medicine_id = #{medicineId} AND m.is_controlled = 1 ORDER BY i.expiry_date ASC, i.id ASC

SELECT ir.id, ir.batch_no, ir.change_type, ir.change_quantity, ir.before_quantity, ir.after_quantity, ir.source_type, ir.source_id, ir.operator_id, u.real_name AS operator_name, ir.remark, ir.created_at FROM inventory_record ir INNER JOIN medicine m ON ir.medicine_id = m.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON ir.operator_id = u.id WHERE ir.medicine_id = #{medicineId} AND m.is_controlled = 1 ORDER BY ir.created_at DESC, ir.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
